posts.author: MatthewB (Matthew Buchmeier)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I just hit the 500 limit on the Label column and now need to solve for this new challenge. The problem for me, and I’m sure for other Monday users, is that we may not know some of these limitations when we’re designing a workflow. We discover the ceiling when we hit the ceiling and then have to quickly re-engineer. Why can’t these limitations show when adding the column, or when accessing column settings.

What are you trying to achieve

Better up front workflow design through transparency around data / column limits
